race.description: Sportsbet Same Race Multi Mdn Plate
race.comment: AMICAL (1) finished fourth when just tiring late fresh last start over 1200m at Balaklava. Fitter and capable of taking this out. SETTLE PETAL (11) returns or the Pickering camp after showing good signs on debut last time in at Balaklava. Looks to have come on nicely during the break and can make an immediate impact. Big threat. CADIA VALLEY (2) is on debut. By Street Boss and comes from the David Jolly & Justin Potter stable. Has been seen at any public work in readiness but a positive move in betting has to be respected. MR VEXATIOUS (4) will find this a little easier than last time and can turn in a stronger showing third-up. Not forgetting. TAGALONG MISS (12) returns and looks to have come on nicely during the break assessing her lead-up work. Not to be take lightly.
